tagline: Scheduled tasks are now supported in Genie One.
what_it_does: Scheduled tasks are now supported in Genie One. Users can set up recurring prompts to automate weekly digests or daily insights. When a task runs, chat sends you an email with the results.
why_it_matters: This generates more accurate responses and reduces latency by reducing the amount of data Genie One needs to crawl and query.
plain_summary: Scheduled tasks are now supported in Genie One. Users can set up recurring prompts to automate weekly digests or daily insights.
key_takeaway: Scheduled tasks are now supported in Genie One.
